name: Instantly.ai Email Outreach API
what_it_does: AI-powered cold email outreach platform with REST API — enabling sales and marketing teams to run unlimited email accounts for cold outreach at scale, with AI email writing and personalization, inbox rotation for deliverability, lead finder with B2B database, follow-up sequences, and campaign analytics.
use_cases: Managing cold email campaigns and sequences programmatically via Instantly API
Querying campaign performance metrics (open rates, reply rates, clicks) for reporting
Adding leads to outreach sequences from external prospecting tools via API
Pulling reply data and lead status for CRM enrichment and sales handoff
Automating email account warm-up and deliverability management via API
not_for: Transactional email and product notifications (use Postmark or SendGrid)
Marketing email to opted-in subscribers (use Mailchimp or Klaviyo)
Inbound email management and customer support (use Zendesk or Intercom)
best_when: A sales development team or growth agency needs to run high-volume cold email outreach at scale with AI personalization, inbox rotation for deliverability, and unlimited email account sending.
avoid_when: You need transactional or marketing email to opted-in lists, regulatory compliance requires opt-in consent for all emails, or your geography prohibits cold outreach.

auth.notes: API key from Instantly account settings. Passed as Authorization header or api_key query parameter. Account-scoped access. Webhook for email events (reply, bounce, open, click). No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes.

pricing.notes: Founded 2021. Raised seed funding. Very rapid growth in cold email market. Unlimited email accounts on all plans — key differentiator vs competitors. AI email writer for personalization at scale. B2B lead finder database integration. Strong warm-up infrastructure. Agency-friendly with sub-account management.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for campaigns, leads, email accounts, and analytics. API key in header or query param. Good developer documentation. Webhook for email events. Campaign management includes sequence steps, personalization variables, and schedule configuration. Lead finder via separate API endpoint.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Campaign reads idempotent. Lead status reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. Lead addition is append-only — check for duplicate before adding.
known_agent_gotchas: Unlimited email accounts means managing sending diversity for deliverability
API key in query parameter option — avoid URL logging with key exposed
Lead deduplication important — check for existing lead before adding to sequence
CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliance required — implement unsubscribe and opt-out handling
Cold email legality varies by country — verify jurisdiction compliance before campaigns

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. CAN-SPAM and GDPR compliant. US data residency. API key auth. Cold email at scale carries reputation risk — implement proper sending hygiene. Prospect contact data is PII — implement data retention policies. Unsubscribe compliance mandatory for CAN-SPAM.
